creator: skreuzer@exit2shell.com
text:
On Nov 4, 2008, at 9:10 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of databases/maatkit,
>
> Please note that PR ports/128594 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/128594
>
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org


It looks like maatkit now requires Time::HiRes for full functionality.
I updated the patch to include that.

You have my permission to check that in.

Thanks for the port update

Steven Kreuzer
http://www.exit2shell.com/~skreuzer
